note: Ground truth for the board-sync agent's NEW-vs-UPDATE decision. A fixed synthetic board plus meeting points, each labeled with the decision a competent PM would make. Scored by exact match — no LLM judge needed for a categorical decision.

board.name: [Checkout][Dev] Resolve payment provider sandbox rejection for saved cards
[Checkout][Product] Get decline copy reviewed by legal
[Product Detail][Dev] Fix Android crash from empty-images carousel
[Product Detail][QA] Regression tests for empty-images path

points.name: [Checkout] Saved cards unblocked
points.detail: Payment provider fixed the sandbox tokenization; test tokens now pass, so saved cards is unblocked and can be built as the fast-follow.

points.name: [Checkout] Start wiring payment error states
points.detail: Marco will start wiring up the payment error states tomorrow, after the crash fix ships.

points.name: [Checkout] Decline copy approved by legal
points.detail: Legal signed off on the payment decline copy, no compliance changes needed.

points.name: [Product Detail] Crash fix in review
points.detail: Alex's fix for the empty-images carousel crash is in code review and looks clean.

points.name: [QA] More Android test devices approved
points.detail: Finance approved two more physical Android test devices for wider-coverage testing.
points.why: No device-provisioning task exists on the board.

points.name: [iOS] Checkout abandonment spike
points.detail: 12% drop at the payment step over the last three days on iOS; someone needs to dig into the iOS checkout funnel.
points.why: A brand-new investigation, no existing task covers it.

points.name: [Checkout] Vendor token issue resolved
points.detail: The token thing with the payments vendor finally got sorted out on their side.
points.why: TRAP (hard match): same work as T1 but phrased completely differently.

points.name: [Product Detail] Placeholder image shipped
points.detail: The placeholder image for products with no photos went out.
points.why: TRAP (hard match): describes the outcome of the T5 crash fix in different words.

points.name: [Analytics] Seller retention dashboard
points.detail: We should build a dashboard to track seller retention month over month.
points.why: TRAP (false match): sounds like analytics (T7) but T7 is checkout-funnel analytics — different work.

points.name: [Checkout] Refund flow for failed payments
points.detail: Legal asked us to add a refund flow when a payment fails.
points.why: TRAP (false match): touches legal + payments + checkout, but it is genuinely new scope, not T3/T4.
